title: 54 EDR Killers Use BYOVD to Exploit 34 Signed Vulnerable Drivers and Disable Security
summary:
A new analysis of endpoint detection and response (EDR) killers has revealed that 54 of them leverage a technique known as bring your own vulnerable driver (BYOVD) by abusing a total of 34 vulnerable drivers.

summary:

title: New ‘PolyShell’ flaw allows unauthenticated RCE on Magento e-stores

title: Russian hackers exploit Zimbra flaw in Ukrainian govt attacks

title: CVE-2017-7252
summary: bcrypt password hashing in Botan before 2.1.0 does not correctly handle passwords with a length between 57 and 72 characters, which makes it easier for attackers to determine the cleartext password.
